nasb.text: The inhabited cities will be laid waste and the land will be a desolation. So you will know that I am the Lord.” ’ ”

esv.text: And the inhabited cities shall be laid waste, and the land shall become a desolation; and you shall know that I am the Lord.”

cnv.text: 有人居住的城市必成為荒場，這地必然荒涼，你們就知道我是耶和華。’”

ccb.text: 他们居住的城邑必沦为废墟，土地必一片荒凉，他们就知道我是耶和华。’”
